markdown:
#  Create Owner Invoices 
#####  In Beta
This page details the modernized owner invoice experience.
##  Background 
When managing your construction project in Procore, you can generate an owner invoice to bill an upstream collaborator on a prime contract. Then, submit the owner invoice.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To Create Owner Invoices_ , 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * By default, new invoices automatically reflect approved budget changes.
    * You can configure Procore to add approved budget changes and change orders to owner invoices created before their approval. See [About Budget Changes on Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/About%20Budget%20Changes%20on%20Owner%20Invoices%20|%20Overview).


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Prime Contracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-prime-contracts)
  * [Approve Prime Contracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/approve-prime-contracts)
  * Create a Billing Period. See [Manage Billing Periods](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/manage-billing-periods).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Prime Contracts** tool.
  2. Find the contract for which you want to generate an invoice.
  3. In the **Number** column, click the link to open it. ![Prime Contracts Number](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/91ef4b010f6ce3579d40b6b00d186ff9/00dd9039816842cf7a7127a2fe287794/prime-contracts-number.png?fm=webp)
  4. In the contract, click the **Invoices** tab. ![Prime Contracts Invoices Tab](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a28450081a659e41b54ad28c349ff55d/c265390c08943187fc23f2ff89207482/prime-contracts-invoices-tab.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click + **Create** and choose **Create Invoice** from the drop-down menu. 
#####  Tip
**Is the menu option grayed out?** To activate this option, place the contract into the _Approved_ or _Complete_ status.
![Prime Contracts Create Invoice Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d6e63bcaa5002be144770cce7e345143/07e3e3f16bc01dd76ec406bc31bcd72d/prime-contracts-create-invoice-menu.png?fm=webp)  
This opens the **New Invoice for [Contract]** page.
  6. In the **Create Invoice** card, do the following: ![Create Invoice Prefill Checkboxes](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1070c85ec4e1b118cfd9eb0b74001db7/d1a642a412a346c0f51ee3c651fb3ba0/create-invoice-prefill-checkboxes.png?fm=webp)
#####  Note
An asterisk (*) below indicates the field is required.
     * **Invoice No.***  
Enter an invoice number.
     * **Billing Period**  
Procore selects the open billing period's date range or, if no open period, the most recent period's date range. 
#####  Tip
**How do you create a billing period?** Only an [invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) can create billing periods with the Invoicing tool. See [Create Billing Periods](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/manage-billing-periods).
  7. Choose the prefill settings to populate the new invoice.
     * Mark a checkbox to turn the setting ON.  
OR
     * Remove a mark from a checkbox to turn the setting OFF. 
#####  Tip
**Want to save time and improve data entry efficiency?** Procore can populate an owner invoice with financial data from eligible [subcontractor invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), [direct costs](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), and [commitment change orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). For details, see [How does Procore automatically complete amounts on an owner invoice?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-does-procore-automatically-complete-amounts-on-an-owner-invoice)
  8. Click **Create**.  
Procore creates the invoice. Continue with the next step.


##  Next Step 
  * [Edit Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/edit-owner-invoices)


## See Also
  * [Email Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/email-owner-invoices)
  * [Export Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/export-owner-invoices)
  * [View a Summary Preview of an Owner Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/view-a-summary-preview-of-an-owner-invoice)
title: Create Owner Invoices
description: How to create an owner invoice for a prime contract.
